name: groups_create
description: Create a new group of phone numbers that can be used as a batch message target. A phone number can only occur once in a group.

parameters.name: service_plan_id
parameters.description: Your Sinch service plan ID (path parameter).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the group for identification.

parameters.name: members
parameters.description: Array of phone numbers in E.164 format to add as initial members.
